activities.title: Field Activities
activities.description: The AWABEL NGO field team conducted a participatory evaluation mission in the Aka (pygmy) community

topbar.address: Bangui, 6th district, MODOUA neighborhood — Central African Republic

hero.title: Acting together for
hero.desc: AWABEL works to protect and promote women's rights, and to fight poverty, illiteracy, and unemployment in the Central African Republic.

about.title: Our humanitarian mission
about.desc1: Founded on November 25, 2022 during the Constitutive General Assembly, AWABEL (Association Wali ti Béafrica Londo) is a national, non-profit, non-political and non-denominational NGO, governed by Law No. 61/233 of May 27, 1961.
about.desc2: Our statutes were adopted on January 27, 2026 and our internal regulations on January 15, 2026. We collaborate with UN Agencies, international and national NGOs, Embassies, and Central African State Institutions.
about.desc3: AWABEL places women, children, and youth at the heart of its interventions, for sustainable and equitable development in the CAR.
domains: Women's empowerment and youth socio-professional reintegration
Community health, maternal and child health

programs.title: Our areas of action
programs.sub: Each program reflects our commitment to sustainable human development in the Central African Republic.

items.title: Education & Hygiene
items.desc: Access to education, clean water, hygiene and sanitation for vulnerable communities in the CAR.

items.title: Food Security
items.desc: Polytechnic training and strengthening food security in rural and peri-urban areas.

items.title: Environment & Children
items.desc: Environmental protection, children's rights and fighting all forms of violence against minors.

items.title: Women's Empowerment
items.desc: Strengthening women's capacities, vocational training and youth socio-professional reintegration.

items.title: Community Health
items.desc: Maternal and child health, access to care, awareness and prevention in communities.

items.title: Join AWABEL
items.desc: Become a member, volunteer or partner to support our humanitarian mission in the CAR.

team.title: Our leadership team
team.sub: Elected during the General Assembly, the 9 members of the Coordination Bureau guide AWABEL toward its humanitarian mission.

partners.title: Strategic partnerships
partners.sub: AWABEL collaborates with major national and international institutions for lasting impact in the CAR.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.privacyText1: Data collected through this site's forms (name, email, message) are used exclusively to respond to user requests and are transmitted to AWABEL at awabel26@gmail.com.
legal.privacyText2: AWABEL commits not to share this data with third parties without explicit user consent, in accordance with personal data protection principles.
legal.hostingText: This site is hosted on Vercel / Render (free static hosting with automatic HTTPS). It is developed with React 18, TypeScript 5, Bootstrap 5 and Vite 5. Email sending is handled by EmailJS (third-party service).
